Stoicism is a [[hellenistic]] greek philosophical school

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Stoicism]][[Category:Stoicism]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Stoicism]][[sn:Stoicism]]It focused substantially on [[Prosoche]] and is the origin of the term. Also the origin of the term [[Procheiron]]. Both terms have since been deprecated
[[Category:Pages]]
